calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is off calendar. The parties reached an agreement before hearing date per the San Francisco Sheriff's Department. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)
